ceb.between 1422 and 1440–between 1495 and 1: gikan sa 1422 hangtod sa 1440–gikan sa 1495 hangtod sa 1502

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Covert於從1422年到1440年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯勞加姆時，他的父親William Covert35歲，母親Grace Barentyne48歲。他與Lady Ann Vaver結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於從1495年到1502年在英國英格蘭素瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Covert于从1422年到1440年出生在英国英格兰素可斯勞加姆时，他的父亲William Covert35岁，母亲Grace Barentyne48岁。他与Lady Ann Vaver结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于从1495年到1502年在英国英格兰素瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Covert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

variants.name: Coovert
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Kofoed
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nanna.
Danish: from ko ‘cow’ + fod ‘foot’, hence a nickname for someone with a club foot or other deformity of the foot. Compare Kofford .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Covert was born from 1422 to 1440, in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Covert, was 35 and his mother, Grace Barentyne, was 48. He married Lady Ann Vaver. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died from 1495 to 1502, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Covert est né du 1422 au 1440, à Slaugham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Covert, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Grace Barentyne, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Lady Ann Vaver. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé du 1495 au 1502, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Covert von 1422 bis 1440 in Slaugham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Covert 35 und seine Mutter Grace Barentyne 48. Er hat Lady Ann Vaver geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb von 1495 bis 1502 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Covert è nato il da 1422 a 1440 nel Slaugham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Covert, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Grace Barentyne, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Lady Ann Vaver. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì da 1495 a 1502, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Covertがから1422年まで1440年にイギリスイギリススセックススラウアムで生まれた時，父William Covertは35歳，母Grace Barentyneは48歳であった。Lady Ann Vaverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼はから1495年まで1502年にイギリスイギリススリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Covert(이)가 1422년 부터 1440년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 슬로그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Covert(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Barentyne(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Lady Ann Vaver(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1495년 부터 1502년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Covert nasceu de 1422 a 1440, em Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Covert, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Grace Barentyne, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Ann Vaver. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu de 1495 a 1502, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Covert родился с 1422 по 1440 в местности слоам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Covert было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Barentyne, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ann Vaver. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер с 1495 по 1502 в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Ann Vaver. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió desde 1495 hasta 1502, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
